name: Go-to-Market Strategy
description: Builds go-to-market strategies that connect audience, positioning, offer, channels, sales motion, and rollout sequencing into one practical launch plan.

variables.name: product_service
variables.description: Product or service being brought to market

variables.name: target_markets
variables.description: Geographic or segment markets to prioritize

variables.name: launch_timeline
variables.description: Expected launch date and key milestones
